candidates.name: Bone fracture code list
candidates.reason: Project-owned SNOMED code list created for fracture history criteria.

mappings.reason: Reviewed mapping for an extracted condition surface used in fracture-history exclusion criteria. This maps the atomic surface 'Bone fractures' to the project FRACTURE ConceptSet; temporal scope and anatomical exclusions remain criterion logic, not terminology lookup.
mappings.provenance: NCT06524960 criterion #17 surfaced as an unmapped free-text condition during patient-evidence calibration.

mappings.reason: Requires right-heart catheterization/hemodynamic observations not modeled in the current Synthea patient profile.

mappings.reason: Functional-status observations such as ECOG are not represented in the current Synthea patient profile.

candidates.name: Systolic blood pressure
candidates.reason: Blood pressure surface needs systolic specificity before it can map to one LOINC.

candidates.name: Diastolic blood pressure
candidates.reason: Blood pressure surface needs diastolic specificity before it can map to one LOINC.

mappings.reason: Generic blood pressure must be decomposed or specified as systolic/diastolic before predicate execution.
mappings.provenance: 2026-05-11 compiler-review group for generic BP thresholds.
